compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for feasibility-reviewer agent definition
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Create tests/skills/test_feasibility_reviewer_agent.py following the existing agent test pattern (see test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py).

Tests must verify:
- Agent file exists at plugins/dso/agents/feasibility-reviewer.md
- YAML frontmatter contains name: feasibility-reviewer, model: sonnet
- Body contains WebSearch instructions for verifying tool capabilities
- Body contains GitHub code search instructions for known-working examples
- Body contains Technical Feasibility section output format
- Body contains high-risk flagging with spike recommendation
- Body contains integration signal categories (third-party CLI tools, external APIs, CI/CD, infrastructure, data migrations, auth/credential flows)

Tests must FAIL (RED).

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test_feasibility_reviewer_agent.py — Create

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_feasibility_reviewer_agent.py
- [ ] At least 5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_feasibility_reviewer_agent.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Tests fail (RED)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_feasibility_reviewer_agent.py --tb=no -q 2>&1 | grep -q 'failed'

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed (RED confirmed) ✓ — 8/8 tests fail as expected
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — RED tests committed and pushed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
